arts.ttl: Man United star labelled 'coward' by former team-mates evokes reaction from Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Few Manchester United players have covered themselves in glory recently, but Ruben Amorim has offered his thoughts on one player who attracted the ire of his former team-mates

arts.ttl: Joshua Zirkzee future: Misfiring Man United striker 'offered Premier League escape route'
arts.sum: Aston Villa reportedly indicate that they would be willing to offer misfiring Manchester United striker Joshua Zirkzee an escape route from Old Trafford next year.

arts.ttl: Man United star is ready to reject Real Madrid in order to work with Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Excitement at Manchester United is high at the moment with players and fans looking to see what new manager Ruben Amorim can offer this season. Following the departure of Erik ten Hag, the club needed a manager who can bring fresh ideas and someone who has enjoyed success recently. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Amorim gives green light for major Man Utd transfer, player favours them over Arsenal & others
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim is understood to have given the club the green light to try to seal the return transfer of Angel Gomes from Lille. arts.ttl: Man United 'make approach' for Real Madrid midfielder as Ruben Amorim suffers rejection
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Eduardo Camavinga reportedly turns down an advance from Manchester United for a transfer to Old Trafford either in January or the summer.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has different opinion of Man Utd star labelled 'coward' by former team-mate

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU remember the Man United side that secured a record 9-0 win over Ipswich?
